Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Appearances:
Raymond Burke, Esq. for Plaintiff , Dr. Peter Killcommons authorized agent, was sworn & examined.

Principal of $39,000.00
Costs of $252.00
For the total of $39,252.00

Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger.Raymond Burke, Esq. specially appearing for Plaintiff, Nexsys Electronics, Inc. dba Medweb. Peter Killcommons, President of Nexsys Elecronics , Inc. was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked for identification: l) Standard Reseller Agreement, 2) Invoice from Medweb statement and 3) Rental Agreement. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants judgment for Plaintiff, Nexsys Electronics, Inc. dba Medweb as follows: Principal: $29,500.00; Costs: $252.00 for a total judgment of $29,752.00. Order signed in open court.+

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Raymond Burke, Esq. especially appearing for Plaintiff, Nexsys Electronics, Inc. There being no proof of service of statement of damages, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.
